0x0.description: This is not an error code, but represents a positive response. Should not be in this list normally.

0x10.description: The server rejects the request for a reason not covered by other specific NRCs.

0x11.description: The requested service is not supported by the server.

0x12.description: The requested sub-function is not supported or is invalid.

0x13.description: The request message length is incorrect or the format is invalid.
0x13.text: Incorrect Message Length Or Invalid Format

0x14.description: The response message would exceed the available buffer size or transport layer capacity.

0x21.description: The server is busy. The client should try sending the request again later.

0x22.description: The server cannot perform the request due to incorrect operating conditions (e.g., vehicle speed, engine state).

0x24.description: The request was received in an incorrect sequence (e.g., sending a key before requesting a seed).

0x25.description: A component on a sub-network failed to respond in time.

0x26.description: A failure condition prevents the server from executing the requested action.
0x26.text: Failure Prevents Execution Of Requested Action

0x31.description: A parameter in the request is out of its valid range.

0x33.description: The client does not have the required security access level to perform the request.

0x35.description: The key sent by the client does not match the server's computed key.

0x36.description: The client has tried to gain security access too many times.

0x37.description: The client must wait for a specific time delay before attempting security access again.

0x70.description: The server rejected the upload or download request.

0x71.description: The data transfer was suspended, possibly due to an error.

0x72.description: An error occurred during a programming or flashing sequence.

0x73.description: The block sequence counter in the transfer data request is incorrect.

0x78.description: The server has received the request but the action is not yet complete. The client should wait and may receive a final response later.

0x7e.description: The requested sub-function is not supported in the currently active diagnostic session.
0x7e.text: Sub-function Not Supported In Active Session

0x7f.description: The requested service is not supported in the currently active diagnostic session.
0x7f.text: Service Not Supported In Active Session

0x81.description: The engine speed is too high to perform the requested action.

0x82.description: The engine speed is too low to perform the requested action.

0x83.description: The engine is running, preventing the requested action.

0x84.description: The engine is not running, preventing the requested action.

0x85.description: The engine has not been running long enough.

0x86.description: A temperature reading is too high.

0x87.description: A temperature reading is too low.

0x88.description: The vehicle speed is too high.

0x89.description: The vehicle speed is too low.

0x8a.description: The throttle or pedal position is too high.

0x8b.description: The throttle or pedal position is too low.

0x8c.description: The transmission is not in neutral.

0x8d.description: The transmission is not in gear.

0x90.description: The gear shifter is not in Park.

0x91.description: The torque converter clutch is locked.

0x92.description: The vehicle's battery voltage is too high.

0x93.description: The vehicle's battery voltage is too low.
